title: Seltaya (disambiguation)
content:
'''Seltaya''' may refer to:

*[[Seltaya Major]], a planet in the [[Seltaya Major system/Legends|Seltaya Major system]] of the [[Mieru'kar sector/Legends|Mieru'kar sector]]
*[[Seltaya Minor]], a planet in the [[Ropagi system/Legends|Ropagi system]] of the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]]

{{Disambig}}
